title: Basic JavaScript Drag and Drop
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Drag and Drop. Focus on implementing dragstart, dragover, drop events correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Drag and Drop
description: Create a function that uses dragstart, dragover, drop events and DataTransfer API together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Drag and Drop Project
description: Build a small application that applies dragstart, dragover, drop events, DataTransfer API, Draggable attribute in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Drag and Drop
description: The following code has bugs related to dragstart, dragover, drop events. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Drag and Drop
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with dragstart, dragover, drop events and DataTransfer API.
